mapper.sql: select p.id, p.user_id, p.plan_type, p.title, p.description, p.priority, p.status, p.start_time, p.end_time, p.category_id, p.quant_target, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, su.user_name, sd.dept_name, pc.name as category_name, case when a.id is not null then 1 else 0 end as has_achievement, a.id as achievement_id from plan p left join sys_user su on p.user_id = su.user_id left join sys_dept sd on su.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join project_category pc on p.category_id = pc.id left join achievement a on a.plan_id = p.id and a.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: update plan set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
update plan set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
update plan set status = 'ARCHIVED', update_time = sysdate() where del_flag = '0' and status = 'APPROVED' and end_time < sysdate()
update plan set status = 'OVERDUE', update_time = sysdate() where del_flag = '0' and status = 'APPROVED' and end_time < sysdate() and id not in (select distinct plan_id from achievement_plan_ref)
